name: ADLS Monitor
description: Monitor an Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 container for new files and trigger jobs when matching files are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new files are detected in the monitored ADLS Gen2 container directory

outputs.description: Passes file information (storage account, container, path, size, last_modified) to triggered jobs via run_config

container_name.label: Container Name
container_name.description: Name of the ADLS Gen2 container (filesystem) to monitor

directory_path.label: Directory Path
directory_path.description: Directory path within the container to monitor (e.g., 'incoming/' or 'data/2024/')

file_pattern.label: File Pattern
file_pattern.description: Regex pattern to match file names (e.g., '.*\.parquet$' for Parquet files)

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when files are detected

recursive.label: Recursive
recursive.description: Whether to recursively list files in subdirectories

connection_string_env_var.label: Connection String Env Var
connection_string_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the storage connection string. If not provided, DefaultAzureCredential is used.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
